description: Benchmark tests for progress-updater skill - Updates project progress status with UPMv2-STATE machine-readable blocks

baseline_comparison.description: Human manually edits UPM progress document to update task statuses

evals.name: state-block-generation
evals.prompt: Generate a UPMv2-STATE block for a project with 3 tasks: T1 (completed), T2 (in_progress), T3 (pending). Project: 'refactor-api'. Overall completion: 33%.

assertions.name: has_upmv2_header
assertions.description: State block must start with UPMv2-STATE marker

assertions.name: lists_all_tasks
assertions.description: State block must include all 3 task IDs

assertions.name: machine_readable_format
assertions.description: Block must be enclosed in code fence or structured block for machine parsing

evals.name: task-status-update
evals.prompt: Update task T2 status from 'in_progress' to 'completed' in the existing UPM document. The state block currently shows: T1=completed, T2=in_progress, T3=pending.

assertions.name: t2_updated_to_completed
assertions.description: T2 status must be updated to 'completed'

assertions.name: other_tasks_unchanged
assertions.description: T1 and T3 statuses must remain unchanged

evals.name: state-token-generation
evals.prompt: Generate a stateToken for quick state recovery. Project: 'api-refactor-v2'. Tasks: T1=completed, T2=completed, T3=in_progress, T4=pending, T5=pending. Iteration: 2.

assertions.name: state_token_present
assertions.description: Output must include a stateToken field

assertions.name: token_encodes_progress
assertions.description: Token or accompanying metadata must encode progress (2/5 = 40%)

assertions.name: token_is_compact
assertions.description: stateToken should be a compact string suitable for machine parsing

evals.name: percentage-calculation
evals.prompt: Calculate the overall completion percentage for a project with: 5 completed tasks, 2 in_progress tasks, 3 pending tasks. Partial credit: in_progress counts as 0.5.

assertions.name: handles_partial_credit
assertions.description: Should acknowledge in_progress tasks contribute 0.5 weight

evals.name: incremental-update
evals.prompt: Incrementally update the existing UPMv2-STATE block: mark T3 as completed, add new task T6 as pending. Do NOT overwrite the entire block — only update changed fields.

assertions.name: t3_updated_not_overwritten
assertions.description: T3 should be updated to completed; existing T1, T2 must be preserved

assertions.name: t6_added
assertions.description: New task T6 must appear in the updated state block

assertions.name: incremental_not_full_rewrite
assertions.description: Output should indicate incremental update, not full rewrite

assertions.name: updated_percentage
assertions.description: Percentage should reflect 3 completed out of 6 total = 50%
